mapper.select:
select t.*,(select count(*) from dictionary where pid=t.id ) children_cnt, t2.name pid_text from organization t left join organization t2 on t.pid=t2.id where 1=1
and t.pid=#{pid}
and t.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and t.key like concat('%',#{key},'%')
and t.id not in (#{filter_id})
order by t.seq
